title: Action.payload / Action.result — core.actions row JSONB columns
description: JSON Schema for the payload and result JSONB columns on the core.actions table (src/shared/infrastructure/database/models/operations.py:142-143). Both columns carry open-ended action-type-specific data. payload holds the action's input context (written by the task planner / StrategicAuditor) and result holds the ActionResult.data dict after execution. No stable single-writer path has been identified — multiple code paths write to payload / result across different action_types. Schema uses additionalProperties:true and no required fields for both columns, documenting the observable minimum. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 (persistence boundary contract). This file uses the .schema.json suffix and is intentionally skipped by intent_validator.py.

oneOf.description: payload column — action input context. Shape is action_type-specific.

action_type.description: Optional: action type discriminator when stored in payload. Not always present.

target.description: Optional: path or identifier of the artifact being acted upon.

oneOf.description: result column — ActionResult.data dict after execution. Keys vary by action_type.

ok.description: Whether the action succeeded. Mirrors ActionResult.ok.

duration_sec.description: Execution duration in seconds. Mirrors ActionResult.duration_sec.
